title: Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check
summary: Move sleeping places away from glass, tall furniture, damaged walls, hanging objects, gas smells, and blocked exits.
content: Move sleeping places away from glass, tall furniture, damaged walls, hanging objects, gas smells, and blocked exits. Use an outdoor or officially approved shelter when the building shows serious damage or authorities restrict entry. Do not re-enter a damaged building to retrieve nonessential property.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check»
steps: Move sleeping places away from glass, tall furniture, damaged walls, hanging objects, gas smells, and blocked exits.
Use an outdoor or officially approved shelter when the building shows serious damage or authorities restrict entry.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check.
warnings: Do not re-enter a damaged building to retrieve nonessential property.

common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check.

failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check.

when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check.
short_term: For Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Earthquake aftershock sleeping-zone check to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
